stories.title: Cubs 3, Giants 2 — Bounce-Back Win Saturday
stories.angle: NEW STORY (June 6 game recap — Cubs bounced back from 18-3 blowout to win 3-2; series now tied 1-1; record 34-31)

x_posts.label: Post 1A
x_posts.text:
Cubs 3, Giants 2.

BOUNCED BACK. One day after getting torched 18-3, the Cubs answered with a gutsy win to tie the series heading into tonight.

Record: 34-31. Wrigley decides it all tonight at 7:30 PM CT.

#Cubs #GoCubs #FlyTheW

research.facts:

**Facts (verified):**

- Cubs record after: 34-31 overall — HIGH confidence (multiple sources)
- Cubs home record: 19-14 — HIGH confidence
- Context: Previous game (June 5) was 18-3 Giants win — established in prior pipeline

**Story angle:** Bounce-back after the worst loss of the year. Score leads. Series context (tied 1-1 entering tonight). Keep Brown reference implicit — don't fabricate his line.

stories.title: Dansby Swanson BENCHED — .180 BA Slump Hits Crisis Point
stories.angle: FOLLOW UP (Swanson slump; new angle = Counsell actually benches him Saturday for mental reset — first time off this season)

x_posts.label: Post 2A
x_posts.text:
Dansby Swanson is BENCHED.

.180 average. Six hits in his last 46 at-bats. Counsell pulled him Saturday for a mental reset — and who can blame him.

$177M invested. This bat needs to wake up.

#Cubs #CubsBaseball #MLB

research.facts:
Dansby Swanson Benched — .180 BA Slump
**Facts (verified):**
- Current BA: .180 — HIGH confidence (ESPN, Sun-Times, Yahoo Sports)
- Last 14 games: 6 hits in 46 AB = .130 — HIGH confidence
- Counsell benched Swanson June 6 for mental reset — HIGH confidence
- Counsell quote: "Just give him a couple of days away from the game...just give him a different look and just a little break mentally" — HIGH confidence (multiple sources cite)
- Swanson's contract: 7 years, $177M — HIGH confidence (established public contract)
- Defense: .983 fielding %, 4 errors in ~60 games — HIGH confidence
**Facts (MEDIUM):**
- "3rd worst batting average among regular MLB players" — single source ranking; use directional framing ("among the worst")
- Swanson's status for tonight's game: unclear — may or may not return to lineup after the bench day
**Story angle:** Big name, big contract, benched. Hard numbers, clean stat lead.
**Sources:**
- ESPN: https://www.espn.com/mlb/story/_/id/48984900/cubs-hold-slumping-shortstop-dansby-swanson-lineup

stories.title: Cubs Acquire LHP Antoine Kelly from Dodgers
stories.angle: NEW STORY (June 6 trade acquisition — LHP depth amid rotation injury crisis)

x_posts.label: Post 3A
x_posts.text:
The Cubs acquired LHP Antoine Kelly from the Dodgers on Saturday.

With Horton (Tommy John) and Steele (60-day IL) both out, the rotation is PATCHED together right now.

Kelly adds depth. Boyd's activation this week is the real move.

#Cubs #MLB #CubsBaseball

stories.title: Boyd Final Rehab Start Done; Shaw Also Close to Return
stories.angle: FOLLOW UP (rotation reinforcements arc; Boyd made final Iowa rehab start Saturday; Shaw 2-for-4 in recent rehab games)

x_posts.label: Post 4A
x_posts.text:
Boyd made his final Iowa rehab start Saturday — activation this week is the plan.

Matt Shaw is ALSO close: 2-for-4 in rehab after back tightness cost him three weeks.

Both pieces coming back. The Cubs need every healthy body they can get.

#Cubs #GoCubs #CubsBaseball

research.facts:
Boyd Final Rehab Start; Shaw Nearing Activation
**Facts (verified):**
- Boyd made final Iowa rehab start Saturday, June 6 — HIGH confidence (Bleacher Nation, ESPN, Fox Sports)
- Boyd injury: torn left knee meniscus (May 4, 2026)
- Boyd's first rehab start stats: 4 IP, 63 pitches, 2 ER, 4 H, 2 K, 1 BB (confirmed per prior pipeline + research)
- Boyd activation expected this week per Counsell — HIGH confidence
- Shaw injury: mid-back tightness (placed on IL May 22)
- Shaw rehab stats: 0-for-3 (Game 1), 2-for-4 (Game 2) — HIGH confidence (CBS Sports, Bleacher Nation, RotoWire)
- Shaw returns as utility player (Bregman holds 3B starting role) — HIGH confidence
**Story angle:** Double return incoming. Boyd is the bigger story for the rotation. Shaw adds bench depth. Both timely.
**Sources:**
- Bleacher Nation: https://www.bleachernation.com/cubs/2026/05/31/matthew-boyd-rehab-start/
- ESPN: https://www.espn.com/mlb/story/_/id/48885528/cubs-lhp-matthew-boyd-scheduled-make-two-rehab-starts

stories.title: NL Central Watch — Cubs 34-31, June Is the Window
stories.angle: FOLLOW UP (standings tracking; fresh angle = Cubs above .500 at 34-31 but still chasing Milwaukee; sub-.500-heavy June schedule is the opportunity)

x_posts.label: Post 5A
x_posts.text:
Cubs are 34-31 — above .500 but still trailing Milwaukee in the division.

June is the WINDOW — most of the remaining schedule is sub-.500 opponents, and the Giants just tied this series 1-1.

Every win matters. The standings won't wait.

#Cubs #NorthSiders #MLB

**Story angle:** Cubs above .500 at 34-31 but still chasing the Brewers with the Cardinals close. June's sub-.500 schedule = window of opportunity.

stories.title: Series Decider — Taillon vs McDonald, 7:30 PM CT at Wrigley
stories.angle: NEW STORY (rubber game preview — series tied 1-1; Taillon (2-5, 5.13 ERA) vs McDonald (2-3, 4.50 ERA); Cubs 19-14 at home)

x_posts.label: Post 6A
x_posts.text:
Series DECIDER tonight at Wrigley. 7:30 PM CT.

Taillon (2-5, 5.13 ERA) vs McDonald (2-3, 4.50 ERA). Cubs are 19-14 at home — time to prove it.

Win this series against a 26-39 Giants team, or let one of the year's worst slip away.

#Cubs #GoCubs #FlyTheW
